name: Improper Protection of Alternate Path
description: The product does not sufficiently protect all possible paths that a user can take to reach restricted functionality or resources, allowing attackers to bypass protection mechanisms by using an unguarded alternate route.
detection_pattern: Multiple INGRESS or STRUCTURAL paths leading to the same protected STORAGE or TRANSFORM node, where at least one path lacks the AUTH or CONTROL mediator that is enforced on the primary path, enabling bypass of access restrictions
